question: Comment tester manuellement les APIs pendant le developpement ?

principles.text: Fichiers .http versionnes dans le repo + Swagger UI en complement. Pas Postman (pas versionne nativement). Pas curl comme outil principal.

sources.name: JetBrains IntelliJ HTTP Client
sources.quote: HTTP request files stored alongside code, supporting variables and environments

sources.name: VS Code REST Client 5M+ installs
sources.quote: .http files with inline request definitions, variables, and response handling

sources.name: SpringDoc OpenAPI Swagger UI
sources.quote: Auto-generated interactive API documentation from OpenAPI annotations

sources.name: SWEBOK v4 Software Testing
sources.quote: Test artifacts should be version-controlled and reproducible
